title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: COMMUNITY SHARING WARMING SHELTER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts winter weather donations of Socks, gloves, jackets, blankets, tents, tarps, etc. 1440 Birch Avenue Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 942-2176 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 942-2176 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Drop off FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located behind the Dari Mart Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Camping Gear Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
